title: stelis pertusa
intro: Stelis pertusa, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant known for its delicate white flowers and distinctive markings. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Brazil, where it is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis pertusa include the ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often made by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water, to harness its medicinal properties.
